runTitle: GitLab Release QA - v8.11.128 Domain Capability Resolver

skippedSurfaces: Full five-question conversational AI QA was not repeated to avoid extra live LLM cost; v8.11.127 release-facing focused AI QA already closed the peak-load behavior and this release added deterministic runtime contracts with targeted unit coverage

expertAssessments.rationale: GitLab tag pipeline deployed both Vercel frontend and Cloud Run AI Engine, then passed frontend and AI Engine post-deploy smoke jobs.

The AI behavior change is covered by deterministic AI Engine contract tests and previous release-facing focused peak-load QA; this release smoke verified the deployed AI Engine path without adding extra live LLM calls.

Targeted release QA scope matched the change risk: deployment/version checks, frontend smoke, AI Engine deploy, AI Engine post-deploy smoke, and local targeted unit/type checks from the implementation step.

usageChecks.summary: Current Vercel billing period reviewed after v8.11.128 release; effective 6.7213 USD, billed 0.0000 USD, chargeCount 6090.
